=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestAddSingleItem
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestAddSingleItem/adding_a_single_item
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestAddSingleItem/adding_a_single_item/increases_the_item_count
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestAddSingleItem/adding_a_single_item/tracks_the_quantity
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestAddSingleItem/adding_a_single_item/calculates_the_line_total
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestAddMultipleItems
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestAddMultipleItems/adding_multiple_different_items
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestAddMultipleItems/adding_multiple_different_items/counts_all_unique_items
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestAddMultipleItems/adding_multiple_different_items/sums_the_total_across_items
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestAddSameItemTwice
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestAddSameItemTwice/adding_the_same_item_twice
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestAddSameItemTwice/adding_the_same_item_twice/merges_the_quantities
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestAddSameItemTwice/adding_the_same_item_twice/keeps_only_one_unique_entry
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestReduceQuantity
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestReduceQuantity/reducing_quantity_below_current_amount
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestReduceQuantity/reducing_quantity_below_current_amount/decreases_without_removing_the_item
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestReduceQuantity/reducing_quantity_below_current_amount/keeps_the_item_in_the_cart
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestRemoveAllOfItem
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestRemoveAllOfItem/removing_all_of_an_item
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestRemoveAllOfItem/removing_all_of_an_item/removes_the_item_entirely
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestApplyDiscount
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestApplyDiscount/applying_a_10_percent_discount
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestApplyDiscount/applying_a_10_percent_discount/reduces_the_total_within_tolerance
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestApplyExcessiveDiscount
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestApplyExcessiveDiscount/the_discount_exceeds_100_percent
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestApplyExcessiveDiscount/the_discount_exceeds_100_percent/clamps_to_zero
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestCheckoutEmpty
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestCheckoutEmpty/the_cart_is_empty
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestCheckoutEmpty/the_cart_is_empty/returns_an_error
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestCheckoutWithItems
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestCheckoutWithItems/the_cart_has_items
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestCheckoutWithItems/the_cart_has_items/succeeds_without_error
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestCheckoutWithItems/the_cart_has_items/clears_the_cart
--- PASS: TestShoppingCartTestSuite (<TIMESTAMP>)

            --- PASS: TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestAddSingleItem/adding_a_single_item/calculates_the_line_total (<TIMESTAMP>)

        --- PASS: TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestAddMultipleItems/adding_multiple_different_items (<TIMESTAMP>)

            --- PASS: TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestCheckoutWithItems/the_cart_has_items/clears_the_cart (<TIMESTAMP>)
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestAddItem
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestAddItem/adding_items_to_a_fresh_cart
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestAddItem/adding_items_to_a_fresh_cart/tracks_each_item
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestAddItem/adding_items_to_a_fresh_cart/stores_the_correct_quantity
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestRemoveItem
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestRemoveItem/removing_the_last_item
=== RUN   TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestRemoveItem/removing_the_last_item/leaves_the_cart_empty
--- PASS: TestShoppingCartTestSuite (<TIMESTAMP>)
    --- PASS: TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestAddItem (<TIMESTAMP>)
        --- PASS: TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestAddItem/adding_items_to_a_fresh_cart (<TIMESTAMP>)
            --- PASS: TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestAddItem/adding_items_to_a_fresh_cart/tracks_each_item (<TIMESTAMP>)
            --- PASS: TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestAddItem/adding_items_to_a_fresh_cart/stores_the_correct_quantity (<TIMESTAMP>)
    --- PASS: TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestRemoveItem (<TIMESTAMP>)
        --- PASS: TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestRemoveItem/removing_the_last_item (<TIMESTAMP>)
            --- PASS: TestShoppingCartTestSuite/TestRemoveItem/removing_the_last_item/leaves_the_cart_empty (<TIMESTAMP>)
